headline: Trump 🍊👨‍💼 & Iran 🇮🇷🔥 SPAR Over STRAIT HORSE 🐴⚔️ Apache DOWN 💥🚁
text: Trump 🍊👨‍💼 BLAMED 🫵 Iran 🇮🇷 for DOWNING 🪂 an Apache 🚁 chopper over STRAIT of HORMUZ 🐎🌊 and vowed to SLAP BACK 🖐️💥! Centcom 💣 launched AIRSTRIKES 🛩️🔥 at 5PM ET ⏰ on Iranian AIR DEFENSE 📡 sites near the chokepoint 🚢🚫, then said MISSION COMPLETE ✅ in just 3 hours! Iran’s IRGC 🛡️ fired back at US bases in BAHRAIN 🇧🇭 and JORDAN 🇯🇴, while KUWAIT 🪖 said they INTERCEPTED 🛑 the incoming HEAT! Two pilots 🧑‍✈️ were RESCUED by a US SEA DRONE 🤖🌊 – first time that bad boy was PUBLICLY USED 🗣️! Iran claims they hit a TELECOM TOWER 📶 and WATER TANKS 🛢️ in JASK/SIRIK/QESHEM 🏝️, while Trump said both FLYBOYS are SAFE and UNINJURED 🩹. Speaker Mike Johnson 🏛️👔 was IN THE ROOM when the Decider decided to RESUME the BOOM 💥! Iran’s FM Araghchi 🧔‍♂️ warned ‘LEAVE OUR REGION or GET SMOKED’ 🚬 and Qalibaf 🗣️ said they PREFER DIPLOMACY but speak WAR far more FLUENTLY 🗡️! Trump 🍊 told both sides to STOP SHOOTING 🔫 so the ‘VERY GOOD DEAL’ 🤝 can drop in 2-3 DAYS 🗓️ and OPEN the STRAIT like a drive-thru 🌯! Meanwhile Israel 🇮🇱 was still SMACKING Lebanon 🇱🇧, making the whole region feel like a BAD ROM-COM with MISSILES 💣 instead of popcorn 🍿. All this while Trump said peace is ‘subject to IGNORANCE or STUPIDITY’ 🧠🤡 getting in the way – classic Middle East SOAP OPERA 📺🔥!
